16 MONTHS

The $58 Million Project

14 months of progress compressed into 85 seconds.

Duration
16 Months
Location
Severmore, Colorado
Flight Schedule
Bi-weekly → Monthly

The Project

A $58 million construction project that demanded documentation from groundbreaking through closeout. Starting in March 2024 and continuing through August 2026, Wet Dog Drones provided continuous progress monitoring that kept the project timeline visible and accountable.

The Schedule

1
Active Construction Phase
Bi-weekly flights from groundbreaking until dried in
2
Drying In
Once the roof was on and building dried in, flights scaled back to monthly
3
Interior Finishes
Monthly documentation through final punch list and closeout

The Deliverables

📊 Progress Data

  • ✓ Orthomosaics at each flight interval
  • ✓ Timeline comparisons (week-over-week)
  • ✓ Change detection analysis
  • ✓ Volumetric calculations for earthwork

🎥 Visual Deliverables

  • ✓ 85-second time-lapse video
  • ✓ 3D flythroughs
  • ✓ Marketing footage for stakeholders
  • ✓ Custom angles on request
"85 seconds that shows 14 months of progress. That's the power of consistent documentation."

The Value

Progress documentation isn't just about having pretty videos. It's about accountability, timeline management, and stakeholder communication.

  • ✓ Catch delays before they become critical
  • ✓ Document weather-related stoppages
  • ✓ Verify subcontractor progress claims
  • ✓ Provide visual updates to owners and investors
  • ✓ Create marketing content for future projects

The Timeline Compression

14 months of bi-weekly flights equals roughly 30 separate data captures. Each capture included hundreds of photos, processed into orthomosaics with survey-grade accuracy. The result: an 85-second time-lapse that shows the entire transformation from empty lot to completed building.

It's one thing to tell stakeholders the project is on track. It's another thing to show them — compressed into a minute and a half that tells the whole story.

Have a Long-Term Project?

Multi-phase or long-duration projects benefit most from progress monitoring. Let's talk about a flight schedule that matches your construction timeline.

Get a Quote
